reforms.description: The central bank announced the phasing out of the Funding for Growth Scheme Go! for SMEs, which provided zero interest rate loans to encourage lending to small and medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.component_name: Phasing out of Funding for Growth Scheme Go!
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: While the scheme supported SME lending, its phasing out may reduce access to affordable credit for small businesses, impacting their growth potential.
reforms.status_evidence: The central bank announced the phasing out of the Funding for Growth Scheme Go! for SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in the support structure for SMEs, which could have notable implications for their financing and growth.
reforms.source_quote: In June 2021, the central bank announced the phasing out the Funding for Growth Scheme Go! for SMEs once HUF 3 000 will be exhausted.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government plans to allocate a significant portion of the Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF) funds to improve education quality, support the digital transition of public education, and advance R&D capacity of universities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in education and R&D capacity is expected to enhance human capital and innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government’s draft plan allocates one third of RRF grants to health and education improvements.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural investment in human capital and R&D, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: A fifth of RRF funds will be used to develop railway systems to double the number of passengers and reduce CO2 emission, notably through electrification and a shift toward urban public transport.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has introduced reforms to the vocational education and training (VET) system, focusing on aligning educational outcomes with labor market needs by enhancing the emphasis on basic and generic skills, as well as work-based learning.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the skills of the workforce, the reforms aim to enhance productivity and better match graduates with labor market demands, fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms were enacted to address skill mismatches and improve vocational training outcomes.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant adjustment to the VET system, aiming to improve alignment with labor market needs and enhance the skill set of graduates, which is crucial for productivity.
reforms.source_quote: To improve the responsiveness of the VET system to changing labour market needs, the government could forecast future skill needs.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Innovation and Technology, in collaboration with the Tempus Public Foundation and Digital Success Ltd., is developing criteria and an assessment tool for teachers' performance to enhance teaching quality in higher education.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving teaching quality is expected to enhance the skills of graduates, thereby increasing their employability and productivity in the labor market.
reforms.status_evidence: The Ministry of Innovation and Technology is currently developing a set of criteria and an assessment tool.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve the quality of teaching in higher education, which is crucial for enhancing the skills of the workforce.
reforms.source_quote: To enhance the quality of teaching at higher education institutions, the Ministry of Innovation and Technology, jointly with the Tempus Public Foundation and the non-profit organisation Digital Success Ltd., are currently developing a set of criteria and an assessment tool for teachers’ performance.

reforms.description: The government launched a new online service portal in 2020 for businesses, serving as a 'one-stop shop' to access e-government services, aimed at easing administrative procedures for business registration.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying the business registration process, the initiative is expected to enhance market entry and productivity, particularly for new firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The online service portal was launched in 2020.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant improvement in administrative efficiency, which can positively impact the startup ecosystem and overall economic activity.
reforms.source_quote: The government launched a new online service portal in 2020 for businesses that serves as a 'one-stop shop' to access e-government services.

reforms.description: The central bank established an Innovation Hub and a regulatory sandbox to support FinTech companies by providing temporary regulatory waivers for the introduction of new financial products.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating the introduction of innovative financial products can enhance competition and improve access to finance for startups and small businesses.
reforms.status_evidence: The central bank has established an Innovation Hub and a regulatory sandbox.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is a significant step towards fostering innovation in the financial sector, which can have broader implications for the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The central bank has established an Innovation Hub and a regulatory sandbox to help understand FinTech companies’ specific needs.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has committed to invest 1.4% of GDP annually into new national and international railways and the modernization of existing rail tracks, primarily funded by European funds, to improve connectivity with neighboring countries.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving transportation infrastructure enhances connectivity, which can facilitate economic activities and innovation by reducing commuting costs and improving access to markets.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has committed to ongoing investments in rail infrastructure.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in national infrastructure, which is crucial for enhancing regional connectivity and supporting economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The government has committed to invest 1.4% of GDP per year into new national and international railways and in the modernisation of 1 000 km of existing rail tracks up to 2024.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has initiated several strategies, including the Industry 4.0 Strategy and the National Research, Development and Innovation Strategy, to enhance digital adoption and innovation capacity among enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These strategies aim to improve the innovation capacity of firms, particularly SMEs, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has launched multiple strategies to enhance digital adoption and innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: These strategies represent a comprehensive approach to fostering innovation and digital transformation across various sectors, which is essential for economic competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: The government has several strategies that address these issues, including the Industry 4.0 Strategy for a digital industry and the National Research, Development and Innovation Strategy.
